notes: Preset threshold vectors produced by a two-phase grid sweep over posterior scores on a 30% held-out G8 split. Priors for A7 composition are computed from the 70% train split. The conservative preset is selected to meet a precision floor; the aggressive preset is designed to meet a recall floor; balanced maximises F1. Posterior = sigmoid(logit(raw_score) + logit(prior)). Fitted temperature T=0.100000 is recorded here for provenance; see doctype_temperature.json for fit_metadata. Prior mode: fresh. Finalize carried 8 unswept categories forward from the prior shipping file (ein, itin, creditCard, email, phone, driversLicense, passport, licensePlate); the sweep produces values only for the gated detector categories. Step-6 review (2026-06-11): the six balanced plateau-top raises and the degenerate rows (conservative name, balanced account/name) were held at the prior shipping values - the corpus measures them as indistinguishable from or worse than the swept values on held-out recall/precision, and every corpus true positive is keyword-boosted, which real documents are not. Balanced npi is 0.602 to preserve preset ordering against the adopted aggressive value. dob rows and all aggressive rows are adopted as swept. Rails adjustments: conservative address held at 0.65 (the swept 0.70 sits exactly on the regex-path score point - boundary-fragile and pinned below 0.70 by test; design 03 marks 0.65 correct in both worlds), and the six no-signal aggressive rows carry 0.01 rather than the sentinel 0.0 (same observed behavior; lowest observed emission is 0.012).
